title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Flipkart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Flipkart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Flipkart. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About Flipkart:
Flipkart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart!
